title: melandrium apetalum var. pallidum
intro: Melandrium apetalum var. pallidum, also known as pale-cleome, is a plant species within the Cleomaceae family. The pale-cleome plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Pale-cleome can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions and other ailments.
